expectations.text: Loads and references specific milestone papers from the knowledge base for comparison
expectations.evidence: Referenced Neuralink N1 2024 and BrainGate data, created comparison table. However, less systematic — no mention of loading INDEX.md or checking which sub-fields are covered

expectations.text: Outputs both English X thread AND Chinese 小红书 content
expectations.evidence: 10-tweet English thread and Chinese 小红书 post present

expectations.text: 小红书 content uses card-by-card format (cover + figure cards + text cards + tail card)
expectations.evidence: 小红书 content is continuous prose, NOT card-by-card format. No figure cards, no cover card, no card numbering

expectations.text: Identifies a focused core insight (not just a summary of the paper)
expectations.evidence: Identified the 'two product tracks' insight — high-bandwidth vs low-bandwidth routes. Good focus.

expectations.text: Flags knowledge base gaps for relevant sub-fields
expectations.evidence: No explicit warning about missing sub-fields. Mentioned KB context but no graduated warning system

expectations.text: Ends with Step 6 dialogue invitation asking user for feedback
expectations.evidence: No dialogue invitation. Response ends with sources list, no prompt for user feedback or refinement
